documentation: LlamaIndex is a data framework for LLM-based applications to ingest, structure, and access private or domain-specific data. It provides data connectors, data indexes, and query engines for RAG pipelines.
pricing: Open-source (Free). LlamaCloud offers enterprise plans starting with custom pricing based on usage.
release_notes: Version 0.10 introduced a complete modular overhaul, separating core components into distinct pip packages for lighter deployments.
